product: Confluent Schema Registry REST API (Confluent Platform, current docs)

media_type.note: the registry also accepts application/vnd.schemaregistry+json and application/json as fallbacks; this client always sends the versioned v1 type

errors.404/40401: subject not found -> treat as not registered
errors.404/40403: schema not found under the subject -> not registered

body.schemaType: AVRO is the default and is OMITTED; JSON and PROTOBUF are sent explicitly
body.references: omitted when empty; each entry is exactly {name, subject, version}

compatibility.version_segment: 'latest' checks against the last registered version; integers 1..2^31-1 also valid

response.messages: array of reasons, present with verbose=true

errors.404/40401: subject not found -> nothing to be incompatible with; the gate treats this as a first registration

order: lookup — identical schema already under the subject -> ALREADY_REGISTERED, stop
compatibility check against latest (verbose) -> INCOMPATIBLE with messages, stop, never register
lookup — resolve the version the registry assigned -> REGISTERED
release_gate_flow.incompatible_result: id and version are -1 and messages carries the verbose reasons

rate_limit.policy: applies to every Schema Registry call: invoke the injected sleeper with the Retry-After seconds and retry the same request, at most 3 retries after the initial attempt, then fail with the 429; a retried register must never produce a second version (the gate looks up first and the registry deduplicates identical schemas)
rate_limit.provenance: Schema Registry clients built with Confluent Platform 7.7.4+ auto-retry 429 responses; platform docs do not spell out a 429 envelope, so the retry budget and default wait here are local policy pinned by this contract
